MERGE (src_1:Source {id:'google-chrome-cve-2024-0519'})
ON CREATE SET
  src_1.title = 'Google releases security updates for Chrome zero-day CVE-2024-0519 exploited in the wild',
  src_1.publisher = 'Google'
ON MATCH SET
  src_1.title = CASE WHEN src_1.title IS NULL OR src_1.title = '' THEN 'Google releases security updates for Chrome zero-day CVE-2024-0519 exploited in the wild' ELSE src_1.title END,
  src_1.publisher = CASE WHEN src_1.publisher IS NULL OR src_1.publisher = '' THEN 'Google' ELSE src_1.publisher END
MERGE (cve_1:CVE {id:'CVE-2024-0519'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_1.summary = 'High-severity Chrome zero-day in the V8 JavaScript engine caused by out-of-bounds memory access; exploitable via crafted HTML page to read beyond buffer via heap corruption, potentially exposing sensitive information or causing a crash; may also be used to bypass protections such as ASLR to ease achieving code execution via another weakness.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_1.summary = CASE WHEN cve_1.summary IS NULL OR cve_1.summary = '' THEN 'High-severity Chrome zero-day in the V8 JavaScript engine caused by out-of-bounds memory access; exploitable via crafted HTML page to read beyond buffer via heap corruption, potentially exposing sensitive information or causing a crash; may also be used to bypass protections such as ASLR to ease achieving code execution via another weakness.' ELSE cve_1.summary END
MERGE (cve_1)-[sup_1:supported_by]->(src_1)
ON CREATE SET
  sup_1.quote = 'Google released security updates to fix a high-severity Chrome zero-day (CVE-2024-0519) exploited in the wild; out-of-bounds memory access in V8 exploitable via crafted HTML page; may bypass ASLR.'
ON MATCH SET
  sup_1.quote = CASE WHEN sup_1.quote IS NULL OR sup_1.quote = '' THEN 'Google released security updates to fix a high-severity Chrome zero-day (CVE-2024-0519) exploited in the wild; out-of-bounds memory access in V8 exploitable via crafted HTML page; may bypass ASLR.' ELSE sup_1.quote END;

ON MATCH SET cve_1.summary = CASE WHEN cve_1.summary IS NULL OR trim(cve_1.summary) = '' THEN 'Elevation of privileges vulnerability in Windows Client Server Runtime Subsystem (CSRSS) affecting Windows 11 (and earlier) and Windows Server 2022 (and earlier) and reported as exploited in the wild; CVSS 7.8; initially classified as a zero-day.'
